title: poa rupestris
intro: Poa rupestris, also known as alpine meadow-grass or alpine bluegrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa rupestris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Poa rupestris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
